summary: Post-refactor regression pass for Fork-Fate. Verified backend places search refactor (food/shops/fuel + radius), admin HttpOnly cookie auth (login/verify/logout, no localStorage token, ff_admin cookie is httpOnly), all 9 themes render correct scene testids without console errors, ShufflingDeck opens with 5 card-backs and lands on a result for default/dark and cyber themes, Shops+Fuel deal produce a result (curated fallback), shared crawl invalid link route shows 'This crawl link is invalid or has expired.' correctly (route is /c/:code, not /crawl/:code as stated in prompt), Pub Crawl mode dealing produced a result card ('Hudson Yards Tavern' YOUR PICK).
action_items: Minor: The review request mentions shared crawl at '/crawl/<code>' but the actual React route is '/c/:code'. Confirm intended URL scheme (both should not exist unless aliased).

Pub Crawl 'route dialog with multiple stops' not exposed via testids like crawl-route-dialog or crawl-stop-N — a crawl deal produced a single 'YOUR PICK' result card. If a multi-stop route dialog is expected, verify it renders and add data-testids for automated tests.
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx (~2200 lines) still large — extraction of ThemeScenes/ReaperScene/ShufflingDeck is a good start; consider extracting the Pub Crawl UI block next.
Frontend calls ipapi.co/latitude directly from browser and hits CORS (harmless, but noisy in console). Consider proxying via backend or catching the CORS error silently.
test_credentials: Admin password from /app/memory/test_credentials.md (GrimReaper!2026). Cookie 'ff_admin' is HttpOnly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Correct shared crawl route is /c/:code. Deal-button testid is 'spin-roulette-button'. Themes are persisted in localStorage 'ff_theme' and require a page reload to render the theme scene. When testing shuffle in themes, first navigate to home, then evaluate localStorage.setItem for ff_theme+ff_theme_hint_seen+ff_muted+ff_guided_seen, THEN goto home again. When clicking crawl-mode-toggle, verify picker becomes visible before proceeding (the toggle may already be on).
verified_flows: Backend POST /api/places/search food/shops/fuel + radius 2/5 mi all 200 with results
Admin POST /api/admin/login sets ff_admin HttpOnly cookie, GET /api/admin/verify 200, POST /api/admin/logout clears cookie
Admin UI: login card -> MRR overview, no localStorage 'ff_admin_token', logout returns to login
9 themes (dark/light/fall/winter/spring/summer/cyber/steam/tiki) each render their expected scene testid with 0 real console errors
Shops + Fuel deal produce result cards
/c/INVALIDCODE123 shows 'This crawl link is invalid or has expired.' with 'Deal your own fate' CTA
Pub Crawl deal produced a landed 'YOUR PICK' card (Hudson Yards Tavern)
